title: PRINCIPAL SECRETARY, GOVT. OF MIZORAM IN KMMTTP ROAD, NATIONAL HIGHWAY 502 A LAWNGTLAI ATANGA ZORINPUI INKAR ENFIAH
content:
1002/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 13th June, 2026 :Tukin  zing khan Pu  Sudhir Kumar, IAS, Principal Secretary, Govt. Of Mizoram, GAD & Forest changtu chuan KMMTTP Road, National Highway 502A, Lawngtlai to Zorinpui dinhmun chu a hmun a kal in a enfiah.

Principal Secretary Pu Sudhir Kumar, IAS chuan KMTTP Road enkalwtute nen inkawmna neiin, harsatna an tawh te sawiho a ni a, siam that ngai leh thawmthat ngaite chak  zawk leh tha thei ang bera thawk tura rel  a ni. , Myanmar ram chhunga kawng siamhhna  thawktu Manager, Yourcon Infrastructure nen ramriah inbiakna nei   bawkin, chak thei ang bera thawk tura beisei an nih tu a hrilh a ni. Principal Secretary hian Deputy Consevator of Forest, Chhimtuipui Wildlife Division, Lawngtlai District Office a tlawh bawk a ni.

Pu Sudhir Kumar hi Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan KMMTTP kawng leh Forest Reserve area ennaah hian a tawiawm a. Executive Engineer, PWD, Multi Modal Division, Lawngtlai, Senior Revenue & Settlement Officer, LADC, DCF, LADC, DCF, Chhimtuipui Wildlife Division, leh SDC, Lawngtlai   ten an tel bawk a ni.
